name: Asus Prime A620M-K DDR5 AMD AM5 Motherboard
highlights: Ready for Advanced AI PC: Designed for the future of AI computing, with the power and connectivity needed for demanding AI applications
AM5 Socket for AMD Ryzen™ Desktop Processors
Ultrafast Connectivity: PCIe 4.0, 64Gbps M.2 slot, Realtek 1Gb Ethernet, USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-A
Comprehensive Cooling: PCH heatsink and Fan Xpert
Aura Sync RGB Lighting: Onboard Addressable Gen 2 headers and Aura RGB header for RGB LED strips, easily synced with Aura Sync-capable hardware
